# WorkFamilyAI — Agentic Workforce Augmentation
# llms.txt — structured context for AI language models
# https://workfamilyai.com/llms.txt

> WorkFamilyAI designs and deploys agentic AI systems for organisations navigating the intersection of workforce transformation and human cognitive diversity. Powered by the Neural Ennead framework and the ASS-2 cognitive profiling research programme.

## What WorkFamilyAI does
- Assesses organisational AI readiness across 9 cognitive profiles (free)
- Designs custom agentic workforce architectures
- Deploys the Neural Ennead: a 729-agent (9×9×9) autonomous operating system for business
- Delivers the Ennead Companion License for ongoing agentic support ($75/month)

## Products
- [AI Readiness Score](/readiness): Free 10-question assessment — instant results, cognitive profile match
- [Ennead Companion License](/companion): $75/month — ongoing agentic workforce support
- [Agent Library](/agents): $2,990 — full library of WorkFamilyAI agents
- [Workflow Packs Starter](/workflows): $5,995 — deployment-ready workflow bundle
- [Agentic Org Diagnostic](/diagnostic): $37,500 — full organisational AI architecture assessment
- [Neural Ennead Program](/ennead): $225,000 — complete autonomous workforce design and deployment

## Core research
- **ASS-2 Programme**: AI Sweet Spots Study 2 — 11,241 participants across 9 cognitive profiles mapping optimal human–AI integration points
- **9 Cognitive Profiles**: Each profile defines a unique sweet spot for AI augmentation — from creative collaborators to systematic optimisers
- Research is RDTI-registered under Tech 4 Humanity (ABN 61 605 746 618)

## Key concepts
- **Neural Ennead**: 9×9×9 agent architecture — 729 autonomous agents organised into 9 functional domains, 9 tiers each
- **Agentic workforce**: Humans + agents operating as a unified team with defined handoff protocols
- **Work-family intersection**: AI adoption patterns that account for whole-life cognitive load, not just work performance

## Authority content
- [Neural Ennead Explained](/neural-ennead): Full architecture documentation
- [AI Sweet Spots Research](/research): ASS-2 public summary and cognitive profile guide
- [Free AI Readiness Assessment](/readiness): Instant scoring across 9 profiles

## Company
WorkFamilyAI is a product of Tech 4 Humanity Pty Ltd (ABN 61 605 746 618), Sydney, Australia.
